data.description: TRUMP MEETS WITH TOP ADVISERS ON IRAN FRIDAY: NYT

Trump was meeting on Friday with top advisers and senior members of his cabinet to decide whether to intensify the military assault against Iran, according to four people briefed on the planned discussion - NYT

data.title: US government acknowledged withholding grants from states not supporting Trump in 2024, affecting billions in energy funding.
data.description: According to court documents, federal officials have confirmed the suspension of funding for energy projects to states, amounting to billions of dollars. The decision to halt funding was reportedly made solely based on the states' support or opposition to President Trump in the 2024 election.

data.title: Helium Evolution secures $25M financing with top global investors.
data.description: A recent report indicated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The report also revealed that the economy created over 250,000 new jobs last month, surpassing expectations. Additionally, the average hourly wage increased by 3.2% compared to the previous year. This positive trend in job creation and wage growth has been attributed to various factors, including increased consumer spending and business investments. Experts believe that the strong performance of the labor market is indicative of a robust economy.

data.title: Hubbell Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
data.description: On July 24, 2026, the Board of Directors of Hubbell Incorporated announced a quarterly dividend of $1.42 per share for shareholders of record as of August 31, 2026. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on September 15, 2026. Hubbell Incorporated is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol HUBB.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Gains Amid Iran News, Oil Slides; Oracle Hits New Lows (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase as oil prices slightly decreased following significant increases in previous sessions. Conversely, SpaceX stock recorded a drop. The market update highlights the Dow's positive performance amidst news regarding Iran, while also noting a decline in oil prices and Oracle stock hitting new lows.

data.title: Former top Bitcoin mining pool, Poolin, declares bankruptcy. Selling last Texas sites to repay 11,700 users with IOUs.
data.description: After experiencing frozen withdrawals in 2022, the pool based in Singapore has been unable to bounce back. As a result, the pool is currently in the process of auctioning off its final Texas mining locations in order to repay 11,700 users who are still in possession of IOUs.

data.title: Clarity Act in limbo as ethics clash and time crunch may block its passage. Senate Leader Thune hints at delay before August, with slim chance of success.
data.description: Majority Leader of the Senate, John Thune, has indicated that the bill regarding market structure in the crypto industry is unlikely to pass the chamber before the August recess. This delay comes as Democrats refuse to accept the ethics language proposed by the GOP. Additionally, analysts have reduced the likelihood of the bill passing, raising concerns about its future.

data.title: Small businesses are suing Trump admin over new tariffs. Legal group Liberty Justice Center represents, previously won against Trump's duties.
data.description: A legal group known as the Liberty Justice Center, which has previously challenged President Trump's duties, is representing the businesses.

data.title: Award-Winning Author Euran Daniels to Deliver Opening Keynote at International Nevus Outreach Conference, Unveiling New $100,000 Global Initiative to Advance CMN Research and Awareness
data.description: Renowned author, entrepreneur, and advocate for individuals with Congenital Melanocytic Nevus (CMN), Euran S. Daniels, is set to give the opening keynote speech at the upcoming 2026 Nevus Outreach International Conference in Orlando, Florida. The event is scheduled for Sunday, July 26, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. This conference aims to bring together individuals affected by CMN, with an expected audience of several hundred attendees. Daniels' address is highly anticipated and is set to inspire and empower those in the CMN community.

data.title: GENESIS HOUSE AND THE GOTHAM FILM & MEDIA INSTITUTE ANNOUNCE INAUGURAL SHORTS FELLOWSHIP WINNERS
data.description: Three promising young filmmakers named Shanice Brette, Annie Ning, and April Wen have been chosen for the Genesis House x The Gotham Shorts Fellowship. They will be mentored by established industry professionals Sean Wang, Raven Jackson, Josephine Decker, and Matthew Gross as they navigate the crucial production phase. This initiative, announced on July 24, 2026 in New York, aims to support new talent in the filmmaking industry.

data.title: STD Hero Showcases At Home STI Testing In New Orleans During Naughty N'awlins
data.description: A company is promoting at-home test kits for discreetly checking for STDs, food sensitivity, allergies, and Lyme Disease to reduce stigma around sexual health. The brand, STD Hero, showcased its testing kits at Naughty N'awlins event in New Orleans on July 24, 2026. The kits are part of the brand's efforts to promote self-testing and health awareness.

data.title: Indiana and Virginia Encourage a Speedy Way to Meet Rising Energy Demand
data.description: Legislation has been enacted to utilize the Surplus Interconnection Service, aiming to make electricity more cost-effective for the grid. The initiative, introduced on July 24, 2026, in Washington, involves Jenny Netherton, a key figure in The Pew Charitable Trusts' energy modernization program. Across the nation, decision-makers are seeking rapid solutions to facilitate the integration of affordable power onto the grid. The new laws focus on maximizing surplus power connections to drive down costs and improve accessibility. This project involves various stakeholders and aims to enhance energy efficiency and affordability by leveraging innovative strategies.
